page_metadata.biotools__summary: fastqz is a compressor for the most common (Sanger format) FASTQ files produced by DNA sequencing machines. It may be used with a reference genome for better compression.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: fastqz is a compressor for the most common (Sanger format) FASTQ files produced by DNA sequencing machines. It may be used with a reference genome for better compression.
